docs.title: #search-team thread
docs.content:
Thread in #search-team:
grace: pgvector recall is dropping on long queries. Filed SRCH-201 to track.
hank: yeah i reproduced it. queries over 512 tokens get truncated before embedding, so the vector is basically garbage.
grace: SRCH-201 has the repro steps. we should bump the embedding model to text-embedding-3-large which handles up to 8192 tokens.
hank: agreed. also affects the hybrid search fallback path since bm25 index doesn't have this limit.
grace: adding that context to SRCH-201 now.

docs.title: SRCH-201: Vector recall drops on queries >512 tokens
docs.content:
Issue SRCH-201: Vector recall drops on queries longer than 512 tokens
Status: In Progress
Assignee: grace
Description: Embedding model truncates input at 512 tokens. Long queries produce low-quality vectors, recall degrades ~40%. Fix: upgrade to text-embedding-3-large with 8192 token support.

expected_edges.note: Slack thread explicitly names and elaborates on SRCH-201, adding technical context about the 512-token truncation issue
